name: html-collab
description: Turn any single-file HTML report into a portable, reviewable document. Comments, suggested edits, and deterministic merge — all stored inside the HTML file itself.

scripts.build:extension: bun src/extension/build-runtime.ts && bun build src/extension/content.ts --target=browser --format=iife --outfile=extension/dist/content.js && bun build src/extension/popup.ts --target=browser --format=iife --outfile=extension/dist/popup.js && bun build src/extension/review-host.ts --target=browser --format=iife --outfile=extension/dist/review-host.js
scripts.build:examples: bun run build:sample && bun run build:tour
scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build && bun run build:extension && bun run build:examples

author: Glen Maisey <glen.maisey@gmail.com>
